---
title: ""
abstract: |
  whsjajdkja.
keywords: [Ciencia Social Abierta, comportamiento electoral, ultraderecha, autoritarismo, confianza institucional, intolerancia política, meritocracia, reticencia al cambio]
number-sections: false
numbered: false
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    toc: false
  pdf:
    title-block-style: none
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\small\textbf{Palabras clave:} Ciencia Social Abierta
\normalsize
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<style>
nav#TOC { display: none !important; }
div[data-when-format="pdf"] { display: none !important; }
</style>
